title: Main Street Lawyer
writer: Harry Hamilton, Joseph Krumgold, Devery Freeman
actors: Edward Ellis, Anita Louise, Robert Baldwin
plot: Flossie, girl friend of gangster Tony Marco, is released from the state penitentiary. With Marco and Ballou, his lawyer, she goes to Corinthia to deliver a letter to "Link" Boggs, from her cell-mate who died while in the prison. T...
